index.title: Portal
index.description: St. Expedite Press portal — books, merch, mission, lab, services, and contact.

books.title: Books
books.description: Books, current publications, and oncoming projects from St. Expedite Press.
books.subtitle: Publications and current program
books.introTitle: Books built for rereading, not disposal.
books.introText: This page is the clearest view of the press itself: current books, the developing program, and direct paths to reading or purchase.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Mission, editorial orientation, and publishing commitments of St. Expedite Press.
mission.subtitle: Editorial orientation
mission.introTitle: A small press with long-form standards.
mission.introText: St. Expedite Press publishes books that ask for stewardship: durable editorial attention, deliberate pacing, and a bias toward work meant to endure.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: General contact for St. Expedite Press, including editorial questions and updates signup.
contact.subtitle: General inquiries and updates
contact.introTitle: Use this page for conversations, not manuscripts.
contact.introText: Reach the press for general correspondence, rights, collaborations, or editorial questions. For manuscript inquiries, use the dedicated submission page.

submit.title: Submission
submit.description: Submission inquiries for St. Expedite Press, with confirmation and email fallback.
submit.subtitle: Manuscript and project inquiries
submit.introTitle: Start with a concise inquiry, then send materials by reply.
submit.introText: Use this page for manuscript and project inquiries. After submission you will receive a reference email; if materials are needed, reply to that thread with attachments.

lab.title: Lab
lab.description: Interactive experiments and ongoing instruments, including the American Anglossic Compass.
lab.subtitle: Experimental instruments
lab.introTitle: The Lab holds instruments, drafts, and live tests.
lab.introText: This page is explicitly experimental. The American Anglossic Compass remains available here as a field instrument rather than part of the main publishing catalog.

gallery.title: Store
gallery.description: Merchandise storefront for St. Expedite Press, loaded live from the external shop catalog.
gallery.subtitle: Merchandise and external storefront
gallery.introTitle: Merchandise is sold through the external shop.
gallery.introText: Prices and inventory on this page are loaded live from the store catalog. Checkout and order support continue on the dedicated shop domain.

services.title: Services
services.description: Advisory, editorial, and decision-intelligence services offered through St. Expedite Press.
services.subtitle: Advisory and editorial work
services.introTitle: Selected advisory work for institutions that need careful judgment.
services.introText: The press also undertakes a small amount of external advisory work: editorial strategy, ontology and decision-intelligence systems, and governance-minded AI consulting.
